workers.label: Backend tests
workers.focus: Create ONE new pytest file under backend/tests/ (do not edit existing tests). Use: from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from app.main import app; client = TestClient(app). Test the gap route with X-Actor-Role and X-Actor-Id headers. Assert status codes only (200, 403, 404, 422). Max 60 lines. Do NOT import backend.* or invent crud/schemas modules.
